response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video content. 2. Confirmed that the video consists entirely of a conversational monologue by the streamer, Ookami Mio. 3. Evaluated the persistent text 'ヒロイン' (Heroine) in the bottom-right corner and determined it is a static stream asset, not an indication of a song performance. 4. Concluded that no vocal music is performed in this video. 5. Generated the JSON with the appropriate flag 'contains_vocal_music: false'.
response.global_summary: The video features the VTuber Ookami Mio engaged in a casual chat stream. Throughout the segment, she tells a story about her struggles with applying a screen protector to her smartphone and how she was relieved when a store employee helped her with it. There is no vocal music performed in this video.

scenes.description: Ookami Mio talks to her viewers about her experience trying to apply a screen protector to her smartphone, mentioning her difficulties and how a store employee eventually helped her. The stream is purely conversational.
